skills.name: CryptoScanner
skills.tagline: Scan top 50 coins for momentum signals
skills.description: Scans the top 50 cryptocurrencies by market cap for price momentum signals. Outputs daily summary to Telegram. Paper trade triggers only — no auto-execution.
skills.long_description: CryptoScanner pulls live data from CoinGecko every 6 hours and ranks the top 50 coins by momentum score — a composite of 24h price change, volume surge, and RSI proximity to breakout zones. Results are formatted as a clean Telegram message with emoji indicators. Completely paper-trade safe: it never connects to any exchange API. All outputs are read-only signals for your review. Perfect entry point for anyone new to AI-assisted crypto analysis.
skills.safety_notes: Read-only CoinGecko API calls only. No exchange connectivity. No auto-trading. Reviewed and verified by Paarthurnax team on 2026-03-22.

skills.name: TechAnalyzer
skills.description: Calculates RSI and MACD for any coin. Outputs buy/sell signals to Telegram. No auto-execution — you decide what to do with the signals.
skills.long_description: TechAnalyzer computes RSI (14-period) and MACD (12/26/9) for any coin pair you configure. When RSI crosses key thresholds (oversold <30, overbought >70) or MACD produces a bullish/bearish crossover, it fires a Telegram alert with full context: current price, signal strength, and a confidence score. You can monitor up to 10 coins simultaneously. All data sourced from CoinGecko — no exchange account needed.
skills.safety_notes: Read-only market data. No exchange API keys required. No order placement capability. Signals are informational only. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: RiskGuard
skills.description: Sets maximum position size as % of portfolio. Blocks paper trades that exceed your risk threshold. The single most important skill for beginners.
skills.long_description: RiskGuard is your circuit breaker. Configure a max position size (e.g., 5% of portfolio per trade) and it will block any paper trade that exceeds it — even if another skill suggests it. It also enforces daily loss limits: if your paper portfolio drops more than X% in a day, it puts all other trading skills into 'observe only' mode until you manually reset. Think of it as your responsible adult supervisor. Essential for anyone learning systematic trading.
requirements: Compatible with all other CryptoClaw skills
skills.safety_notes: Paper trading only — no real funds involved. Acts as a guardrail layer, not a trading engine. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: PortfolioTracker
skills.tagline: Daily P&L report on your paper portfolio
skills.description: Tracks all open paper positions. Generates daily P&L report via email. Compares your performance against BTC benchmark so you know if you're actually beating the market.
skills.long_description: PortfolioTracker logs every paper trade your OpenClaw agent suggests, tracks open positions in a local JSON file, and sends you a daily email report at 9 AM your time. The report shows: total portfolio value, daily P&L in $ and %, best/worst performers, and a comparison against simply holding BTC. After 30 days you'll have enough data to know if your strategy actually adds alpha. No exchange connectivity — all simulated using CoinGecko prices.
skills.safety_notes: Simulation only. Stores data in local JSON files. No real funds tracked. CoinGecko read-only. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: NewsSentiment
skills.description: Monitors crypto news headlines and scores sentiment using local Ollama model. Sends Telegram alert only for high-impact news — no noise, just signal.
skills.long_description: NewsSentiment scrapes CryptoPanic and CoinDesk RSS every 30 minutes, runs each headline through a local Ollama llama3 model for sentiment scoring (bullish/bearish/neutral + confidence %), and only fires a Telegram alert when: (a) confidence > 75% and (b) the coin has >$1B market cap. This filters out 90% of the noise. High-impact alerts include: the headline, sentiment score, affected coins, and a suggested 'watch' action (never a trade command). Runs entirely locally — your Ollama instance, your data.
skills.safety_notes: All AI processing runs locally via Ollama. No data sent to external AI APIs. News data from public RSS feeds only. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: DCA Companion
skills.tagline: Dollar-cost averaging tracker with schedule alerts
skills.description: Tracks your DCA schedule and logs paper trades automatically. Shows average cost basis and total paper P&L across all buy events.
skills.long_description: DCA Companion automates your dollar-cost averaging strategy in paper trading mode. Configure your coin, amount, and frequency (daily/weekly/monthly) and it logs simulated buy events at real CoinGecko prices. Tracks your running average cost, total paper invested, and current P&L. Sends a Telegram digest after each buy event. After 90 days you'll know exactly what your DCA returns would have been — before committing real capital.
skills.safety_notes: Paper trading only. No exchange API required. CoinGecko read-only. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: Whale Alert Listener
skills.tagline: Monitors large wallet movements in real time
skills.description: Monitors Ethereum and BSC wallets for large token transfers (>$100K). Fires Telegram alert within 5 minutes using public blockchain APIs.
skills.long_description: Whale Alert Listener watches configurable wallet addresses and network-wide transactions for large token movements. Uses Etherscan and BSCScan free APIs to detect transfers above your threshold (default: $100K equivalent). When a whale moves funds, you get a Telegram alert with: wallet addresses, token, amount in USD, transaction link, and a 'smart money direction' indicator (exchange deposit = possibly selling, withdrawal = possibly accumulating). No exchange account needed — all public blockchain data.
skills.safety_notes: Read-only blockchain data via public APIs. Monitors public wallet addresses only. No trading capability. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: Gas Fee Monitor
skills.tagline: Alerts when ETH gas drops below your threshold
skills.description: Monitors ETH gas prices via Etherscan free API. Sends Telegram alert when gas falls below your configured threshold. Perfect for timing DeFi transactions.
skills.long_description: Gas Fee Monitor polls the Etherscan gas oracle every 2 minutes and alerts you via Telegram when the current fast gas price drops below your configured threshold (default: 20 Gwei). Includes: current slow/standard/fast gas prices, estimated transaction cost for common operations (ERC20 transfer, Uniswap swap, NFT mint), and a 4-hour gas trend chart summary. Free to use — this skill exists to demonstrate the OpenClaw marketplace and build seller credibility.
skills.safety_notes: Read-only Etherscan API calls. No wallet interaction. No transaction signing capability. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: Liquidation Scanner
skills.tagline: Scans leveraged positions at risk of liquidation
skills.description: Monitors Aave and Compound positions for liquidation risk. Alerts when health factor drops below 1.5. Uses DefiLlama + Etherscan free APIs.
skills.long_description: Liquidation Scanner queries Aave V3 and Compound III position data for your configured wallet addresses and fires an escalating alert sequence when liquidation risk increases. Green zone (HF > 2.0): daily digest only. Yellow zone (HF 1.5-2.0): alert every 4 hours. Red zone (HF < 1.5): alert every 30 minutes with suggested actions. Uses DefiLlama API for protocol state and Etherscan for on-chain verification. All read-only — it watches and warns, you decide what to do. Potentially the most important skill you'll install if you use leverage.
skills.safety_notes: Read-only monitoring only. Cannot modify positions or execute transactions. All data from public APIs and on-chain reads. Reviewed 2026-03-22.

skills.name: Yield Optimizer
skills.tagline: Tracks DeFi yield rates across protocols
skills.description: Tracks APY across 20+ DeFi protocols via DefiLlama. Daily digest of top yields for your assets. Alerts when a new pool exceeds your APY threshold.
skills.long_description: Yield Optimizer fetches live APY data from 20+ DeFi protocols via the free DefiLlama API — including Aave, Compound, Curve, Convex, Yearn, Lido, and more. Configure your target assets (USDC, ETH, stablecoins) and your minimum APY threshold. Every morning at 7 AM it sends a Telegram digest: the top 10 yield opportunities for your assets, sorted by APY with protocol risk ratings. If a new pool appears with APY above your threshold, it fires an immediate alert. Risk ratings factor in: protocol age, TVL, audit status, smart contract complexity. You still decide whether to move funds — this just ensures you never miss a better yield.
skills.safety_notes: Read-only yield data from DefiLlama public API. No wallet connectivity required. No transaction capability. Reviewed 2026-03-22.
